description: Configure the shared pharmacy dispensing workstation browser according to the Pharmacy Workstation SOP. Organize the 32 scattered bookmarks into folders named 'Drug Information', 'Shortages & Recalls', 'Regulatory & Guidelines', and 'Unauthorized_Personal' on the bookmark bar, ensuring no loose bookmarks remain. Create custom site search shortcuts with keyword 'ndc' pointing to DailyMed search and keyword 'fda' pointing to Drugs@FDA search. Set the browser homepage to 'https://dailymed.nlm.nih.gov'. For HIPAA compliance, disable password saving, address autofill, and payment autofill, and block third-party cookies. Set the default download directory to '/home/ga/Documents/Rx_Transfers' and enable the option to ask where to save each file before downloading.
